    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[ApprovedBy], [c].[ApprovedOn], [c].[ContractNumber], [c].[ContractValue], [c].[CreatedOn], [c].[Description], [c].[EndDate], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[IsRenewal], [c].[ParentContractId], [c].[RejectionReason], [c].[RenewalApprovedBy], [c].[RenewalApprovedOn], [c].[RenewalRequestedOn], [c].[StartDate], [c].[Status], [c].[SubmittedOn], [c].[TerminatedBy], [c].[TerminatedOn], [c].[TerminationReason], [c].[Title], [c].[UpdatedOn], [c].[VendorId]

    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[ApprovedBy], [c].[ApprovedOn], [c].[ContractNumber], [c].[ContractValue], [c].[CreatedOn], [c].[Description], [c].[EndDate], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[IsRenewal], [c].[ParentContractId], [c].[RejectionReason], [c].[RenewalApprovedBy], [c].[RenewalApprovedOn], [c].[RenewalRequestedOn], [c].[StartDate], [c].[Status], [c].[SubmittedOn], [c].[TerminatedBy], [c].[TerminatedOn], [c].[TerminationReason], [c].[Title], [c].[UpdatedOn], [c].[VendorId]
    FROM [Contracts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [c].[Id] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Vendors] AS [v] ON [t].[VendorId] = [v].[Id]
ORDER BY [t].[Id] DESC
